allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./data/vc-talent.db''\); const tables = db.prepare\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table''""\).all\(\); console.log\(tables\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(c[''''name''''], c[''''is_executive''''], c[''''seniority'''']\) for c in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(sqlite3 data/vc-talent.db "SELECT id, name, seniority, is_executive FROM candidates;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/vc-talent.db "UPDATE candidates SET is_executive = 0 WHERE seniority NOT IN \(''vp'', ''c-level''\) AND is_executive = 1; SELECT id, name, seniority, is_executive FROM candidates;")
